chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petitions No.D –1631 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge For order as to maintainability of petition: 20.03.2020: Sayed Zulfiqar Ali Shah petitioner present in person. ----------- Sayed Zulfiqar Ali Shah, the petitioner herein, has impugned through the instant petition the act of the respondent-Sindh Public Service Commission in failing him in the paper for the post of Assistant Prosecutor General (BPS-17). His efforts to persuade the respondents-Commission to re-check / re-examine for re-evaluation of marks through any independent / impartial examiner of high standard and caliber proved futile. According to him, he has got a sound and convincing percentage of marks in the paper and his academic career throughout is equally sound and convincing one. The petitioner has further expressed suspicion of foul play having been pressed into service in failing him in the ibid paper. He further states that this Court has jurisdiction to call in question the illegal action of the respondent - Commission. Subject to maintainability of this petition, let notice be issued to the respondents as well as to learned AAG for 07.04.2020.
